# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# yamllint disable rule:line-length
imports:
- path: computes/compute_engine.jinja
  name: compute_engine
- path: network/network.jinja
  name: network
resources:
- name: network
  type: network.py
  properties:
    description: Network for our application
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
- name: subnet1
  type: compute_engine.py
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    network: "{{network.name}}"
    ipRange: 10.240.16.0/20
    privateIpGoogleAccess: false
    description: First subnet for application instances
- name: subnet2
  type: compute_engine.py
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-b
    network: "{{network.name}}"<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>
